codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses both prior blocking defects in Import flow: guarded screens now use <Navigate> redirects, and Import Error retry preserves backup route state back into /import/decrypt.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-builder skill procedure currently requires Paper README/screen/screenshot reads for each screen, but fix-only bug work can be completed correctly without design-reference reads; this exception is not explicit in the skill.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-builder/SKILL.md ('Study Paper References') requires README + screen.html + screenshot. worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 5138dcc2-65fc-4871-84a9-3f88347a82d0 shows code/test-focused reads and no igloo-paper reads, while handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true.

summary: Fix review passed. Compared to the original import-flow commit/review, this fix resolves both blocking failures: deep-link guards no longer rely on render-time navigation side effects, and /import/error -> Try Again now carries backup context so decrypt retry works.
